name: Foxy's Big Comeback
description:
The fourth installment in the series of FNAF MG bots inspired by Drakita's comics series!

First Freddy, then Monty, and even a restored Bonnie. Your skills as a technician has restored and upgraded three different animatronics, and landed you a few raises. Business is better than ever at the Freddy Fazbear's Mega Pizzaplex.

Art and Scenario by Drakita!

Foxy's series starts here: https://www.furaffinity.net/view/58122984/
creator: Nobody207
